title: Payload carrying machine and dump body linkage
abstract: Described herein are illustrative payload carrying machines and dump body linkage. An example vehicle can include a frame and a dump body movable relative to the frame. In the example vehicle, an articulation mechanism can be connected to both the dump body and the frame. The articulation mechanism can be a four-link system including a first pair of links can be coupled to the frame and dump body and a second pair of links can be coupled to the frame and dump body. The second pair of links can be longer than the first pair of links.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A vehicle comprising: a frame (102); a dump body (104), the dump body being movably connected to the frame; an articulation mechanism (130) and connected to the dump body and the frame, the articulation mechanism comprising: a first link (134) pivotally connected to the frame at a first pivot point (146) and pivotally connected to the dump body at a second pivot point (144); and a second link (138) pivotally connected to the frame at a third pivot point (142) and pivotally connected to the dump body at a fourth pivot point (140), the first link rotatable about the first and second pivot points and the second link rotatable about the third and fourth pivot points, the first link having a length, LI, which is less than a second length, L2, of the second link; a lift actuator (126) coupled to the dump body and to the frame, the lift actuator configured to move a front (1 16) of the dump body between a lowered position and a raised position relative to the frame, a rear end (120) of the dump body being disposed a first distance (Rl) relative to the first pivot point (146) in the lowered position and the rear end of the dump body being disposed a second distance (R2) relative to the first pivot point (146) in the raised position. 2. The vehicle of claim 1 further comprising: a first mounting bracket (150)(170) located on a bottom of the dump body (104) and pivotally coupled to the first link (134); a second mounting bracket (150)( 170) located on the bottom of the dump body (104) and pivotally coupled to the second link (138); a third mounting bracket (15Q)(170) located on the frame (102) and pivotally coupled to the first link (134); and a fourth mounting bracket (15Q)(170) located on the frame (102) and pivotally coupled to the second link (138). 3. The vehicle of claim 2 where the first mounting bracket (150)(170) and the second mounting bracket are formed as a single bracket (180). 4. The vehicle of any of claims 1 or 2, wherein the third pivot point (142) is located between the first pivot point (146) and the articulation mechanism (130). 5. The vehicle of any claims 1-3, wherein the first link (134) and the second link (138) are pivotally connected to the frame with pin joints (160). 6. The vehicle of claim 1, further comprising: a third link (132) having a length, Li and pivotally connected to the frame at a fifth pivot point (146) and pivotally connected to the dump body at a sixth pivot point (144); and a fourth link (136) having a length, L2 and pivotally connected to the frame at a seventh pivot point (142) and pivotally connected to the dump body at an eighth pivot point (140), the first link rotatable about the first and second pivot points and the second link rotatable about the third and fourth pivot points.
